title: How Anthropic uses Claude in GTM Engineering
summary: Anthropic GTM Product Manager Jared Sires built CLAFTS (Claude Drafts), an AI email assistant that uses the Claude API and Claude Code to draft customer replies in the user's voice. The tool addresses sales rep productivity by automating administrative email work.
